description: Combo CLI for Zoom: drive the locally-installed desktop app via the zoommtg:// URL scheme + on-disk recordings + macOS osascript, and wrap the Zoom REST API v2 (users, meetings, webinars, recordings, reports, dashboards, IM, groups, accounts, webhooks) when Server-to-Server OAuth is configured. Local commands need no Zoom account; cloud commands gate on ZOOM_S2S_ACCOUNT_ID / ZOOM_S2S_CLIENT_ID / ZOOM_S2S_CLIENT_SECRET.

tools.name: accounts_account
tools.description: Retrieve a sub account under the master account. <aside>Your account must be a master account and have this privilege to read sub accounts. Zoom only assigns this privilege to trusted partners</aside>. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_accounts
tools.description: List all the sub accounts under the master account. Optional: page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: accounts_create
tools.description: Create a sub account under the master account. <aside>Your account must be a master account and have this privilege to create sub account. Zoom only assigns this privilege to trusted partners. The created user will not receive a confirmation email.</aside>.

tools.name: accounts_disassociate
tools.description: Disassociate a sub account from the master account. This will leave the account intact but the sub account will not longer be associated with the master account. Required: accountId. Destructive.

tools.name: accounts_billing_account
tools.description: Retrieve billing information for a sub account under the master account. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_billing_account-update
tools.description: Update billing information for a sub account under the master account <aside>Only for the sub account which is a paid account and paid by master account</aside>. Required: accountId. Partial update.

tools.name: accounts_managed-domains_account
tools.description: Retrieve a sub account's managed domains under the master account. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_options_account-update
tools.description: Update a sub account's options under the master account. Required: accountId. Partial update.

tools.name: accounts_plans_account
tools.description: Retrieve plan information for a sub account under the master account <aside>Only for the sub account which is paid by master account</aside>. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_plans_account-addon-create
tools.description: Add an additional plan for sub account <aside>Can only add an Additional plan for the sub account which is a paid account and paid by master account</aside>. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_plans_account-addon-update
tools.description: Update an additional plan for sub account<aside>Can only update an Additional plan for the sub account which is a paid account and paid by master account</aside>. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_plans_account-base-update
tools.description: Update a base plan for a sub account <aside>Can only update a base plan for the sub account which is a paid account and paid by master account</aside>. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_plans_account-create
tools.description: Subscribe plans for a sub account of the master account <aside>Can only subscribe plans for the sub account which is a free account and paid by master account</aside>. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_settings_account
tools.description: Retrieve a sub account's settings under the master account. Required: accountId.

tools.name: accounts_settings_account-update
tools.description: Update a sub account's settings under the master account. Required: accountId. Partial update.

tools.name: groups_create
tools.description: Create a new group under your Zoom account. Required: name (in the request body). Returns the new group's id and name. Groups organize users for shared settings and policies; create the group first, then add members with groups_members_*. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: groups_delete
tools.description: Delete a group under your account. Required: groupId. Destructive.

tools.name: groups_group
tools.description: Retrieve a group under your account. Required: groupId.

tools.name: groups_groups
tools.description: List all groups under your Zoom account, with each group's id, name, and total_members count. Read-only. Use this to discover group ids before calling groups_members_* or groups_get. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: groups_update
tools.description: Update a group under your account. Required: groupId. Partial update.

tools.name: groups_members_group
tools.description: List a group's members under your account. Required: groupId. Optional: page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: groups_members_group-create
tools.description: Add members to a group under your account. Required: groupId.

tools.name: groups_members_group-delete
tools.description: Delete a member from a group under your account. Required: groupId, memberId. Destructive.

tools.name: h323_device-create
tools.description: Create a H.323/SIP Device on your Zoom account.

tools.name: h323_device-delete
tools.description: Delete a H.323/SIP Device on your Zoom account. Required: deviceId. Destructive.

tools.name: h323_device-list
tools.description: List the H.323/SIP room-system devices registered on your Zoom account, returning each device's id, name, protocol (H.323 or SIP), and encryption setting. Read-only. Use to audit conference-room hardware before updating or deleting a device.

tools.name: h323_device-update
tools.description: Update a H.323/SIP Device on your Zoom account. Required: deviceId. Partial update.

tools.name: im_chat-messages
tools.description: Retrieve IM Chat messages for a specified period <aside>This API only supports oauth2.</aside>. Required: sessionId, from, to. Optional: page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: im_chat-sessions
tools.description: Retrieve IM Chat sessions for a specified period <aside>This API only supports oauth2.</aside>. Required: from, to. Optional: page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: im_group
tools.description: Retrieve an IM Group under your account. Required: groupId.

tools.name: im_group-create
tools.description: Create a new IM (instant messaging) directory group under your account. Required: name (in the request body). Returns the new IM group's id. IM groups control chat visibility between users; distinct from meeting/user groups. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: im_group-delete
tools.description: Delete an IM Group under your account. Required: groupId. Destructive.

tools.name: im_group-members
tools.description: List an IM Group's members under your account. Required: groupId. Optional: page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: im_group-members-create
tools.description: Add members to an IM Group under your account. Required: groupId.

tools.name: im_group-members-delete
tools.description: Delete a member from an IM Group under your account. Required: groupId, memberId. Destructive.

tools.name: im_group-update
tools.description: Update an IM Group under your account. Required: groupId. Partial update.

tools.name: im_groups
tools.description: List the IM (instant messaging) directory groups under your account, returning each group's id, name, type, and total_members. Read-only. Distinct from meeting groups (groups_groups). Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: meetings_delete
tools.description: Delete a meeting. Required: meetingId. Optional: occurrence_id. Destructive.

tools.name: meetings_meeting
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a single meeting: topic, type, status, start_time, duration, timezone, join_url, settings, and host id. Required: meetingId (path). Optional: occurrence_id for a specific instance of a recurring meeting. Read-only. Use this when you already have a meeting id and need its current configuration.

tools.name: meetings_update
tools.description: Update a meeting's details. Required: meetingId. Partial update.

tools.name: meetings_invitation_meeting
tools.description: Retrieve the formatted text invitation (join URL, dial-in numbers, meeting ID, password) for a scheduled meeting. Required: meetingId (path). Read-only. Returns an object with a single 'invitation' string suitable for pasting into a calendar invite or email.

tools.name: meetings_livestream_meeting-live-stream-status-update
tools.description: Update a meeting's live stream status. Required: meetingId. Partial update.

tools.name: meetings_livestream_meeting-live-stream-update
tools.description: Update a meeting's live stream. Required: meetingId. Partial update.

tools.name: meetings_polls_meeting
tools.description: List all polls configured on a meeting, returning each poll's id, title, status, and questions. Required: meetingId (path). Read-only. Use this to discover poll ids before meetings_polls_meeting-get or meetings_polls_meeting-update.

tools.name: meetings_polls_meeting-create
tools.description: Create a poll for a meeting. Required: meetingId.

tools.name: meetings_polls_meeting-delete
tools.description: Delete a meeting's Poll. Required: meetingId, pollId. Destructive.

tools.name: meetings_polls_meeting-get
tools.description: Retrieve a single poll on a meeting, including its title, status, and full question/answer-option list. Required: meetingId and pollId (both path). Read-only. Use meetings_polls_meeting first if you don't already have the pollId.

tools.name: meetings_polls_meeting-update
tools.description: Replace a meeting's poll definition (title and the full questions array) in place. Required: meetingId and pollId (path); title and questions (body). Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. This overwrites the poll, so send the complete questions list, not a partial patch.

tools.name: meetings_recordings_delete
tools.description: Delete a meeting's recordings. Required: meetingId. Optional: action. Destructive.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: meetings_recordings_delete-one
tools.description: Delete one meeting recording file. Required: meetingId, recordingId. Optional: action. Destructive.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: meetings_recordings_get
tools.description: Retrieve all cloud recordings for a meeting: each recording file's id, type (MP4/M4A/TIMELINE/CHAT/TRANSCRIPT), download_url, play_url, file_size, and recording_start/end times. Required: meetingId (path; accepts a meeting id or UUID). Read-only. Requires the recording:read scope and cloud recording enabled.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: meetings_recordings_setting-update
tools.description: Retrieve a meeting recording's settings. Required: meetingId.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: meetings_recordings_settings-update
tools.description: Update a meeting recording's settings. Required: meetingId. Partial update.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: meetings_recordings_status-update
tools.description: Recover a meeting's cloud recordings that were previously moved to trash. Required: meetingId (path); action='recover' (body). Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. This is a state change, not a read — use meetings_recordings_get to inspect recordings first.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: meetings_recordings_status-update-one
tools.description: Recover a single recording. Required: meetingId, recordingId.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: meetings_registrants_meeting
tools.description: List registrants of a meeting. Required: meetingId. Optional: occurrence_id, status, page_size (plus 1 more).

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: meetings_registrants_meeting-create
tools.description: Register a participant for a meeting. Required: meetingId. Optional: occurrence_ids.

params.name: occurrence_ids
params.description: Occurrence IDs. You can find these with the meeting get API. Multiple values separated by comma.

tools.name: meetings_registrants_meeting-status
tools.description: Update a meeting registrant's status. Required: meetingId. Optional: occurrence_id.

tools.name: meetings_status_meeting
tools.description: Change a live or scheduled meeting's status. Required: meetingId (path); action (body) — 'end' to end an in-progress meeting or 'recover' to restore a deleted one. Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. Use this to end a meeting programmatically rather than waiting for the host.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-crc
tools.description: Get CRC Port usage hour by hour for a specified time period <aside class='notice'>We will report a maximum of one month. For example, if 'from' is set to '2017-08-05' and 'to' is '2017-10-10' we will adjust 'from' to '2017-09-10'</aside>. Required: from, to.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-im
tools.description: Retrieve metrics of Zoom IM. Required: from, to. Optional: page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-meeting-detail
tools.description: Retrieve live or past meetings detail. Required: meetingId. Optional: type.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-meeting-participant-qos
tools.description: Retrieve live or past meetings participant quality of service. Required: meetingId, participantId. Optional: type.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-meeting-participant-share
tools.description: Retrieve sharing/recording details of live or past meetings participant. Required: meetingId. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-meeting-participants
tools.description: Retrieve live or past meetings participants. Required: meetingId. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-meeting-participants-qos
tools.description: Retrieve list of live or past meetings participants quality of service. Required: meetingId. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of items returned per page

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-meetings
tools.description: List live meetings or past meetings for a specified period. Required: from, to. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-webinar-detail
tools.description: Retrieve live or past webinars detail. Required: webinarId. Optional: type.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-webinar-participant-qos
tools.description: Retrieve live or past webinar participant quality of service. Required: webinarId, participantId. Optional: type.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-webinar-participant-share
tools.description: Retrieve sharing/recording details of live or past webinar participant. Required: webinarId. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-webinar-participants
tools.description: Retrieve live or past webinar participants. Required: webinarId. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-webinar-participants-qos
tools.description: Retrieve list of live or past webinar participants quality of service. Required: webinarId. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of items returned per page

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-webinars
tools.description: List live webinars or past webinars for a specified period. Required: from, to. Optional: type, page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-zoom-room
tools.description: Retrieve zoom room on account. Required: zoomroomId, from, to. Optional: page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: metrics_dashboard-zoom-rooms
tools.description: List all zoom rooms on account. Optional: page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: past-meetings_details
tools.description: Retrieve summary details of a meeting that has already ended: uuid, id, host_id, topic, type, start_time, end_time, duration, and total participant_count. Required: meetingUUID (path; double-encode UUIDs containing '/' or '//'). Read-only. Use past-meetings_instances_past-meetings first to find the UUID of a specific past occurrence.

tools.name: past-meetings_instances_past-meetings
tools.description: List every ended instance (occurrence) of a recurring meeting, returning each instance's uuid and start_time. Required: meetingId (path). Read-only. Each returned uuid feeds past-meetings_details, past-meetings_participants_*, or report_meeting-details.

tools.name: past-meetings_participants_past-meeting
tools.description: Retrieve ended meeting participants. Required: meetingUUID. Optional: page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: past-webinars_instances_past-webinars
tools.description: List every ended instance (occurrence) of a recurring webinar, returning each instance's uuid and start_time. Required: webinarId (path). Read-only. Each returned uuid feeds the past-webinars detail and participant endpoints or report_webinar-details.

tools.name: report_cloud-recording
tools.description: Retrieve cloud recording usage report for a specified period. You can only get cloud recording reports for the most recent period of 6 months. The date gap between from and to dates should be smaller or equal to 30 days. Required: from, to.

tools.name: report_daily
tools.description: Retrieve daily report for one month, can only get daily report for recent 6 months. Optional: year, month.

tools.name: report_meeting-details
tools.description: Retrieve the post-meeting usage report for an ended meeting: host, topic, scheduled vs. actual start/end, duration, total participants, and unique-user count. Required: meetingId (path; accepts id or UUID). Read-only. Reporting endpoints require a paid plan and the report:read:admin scope; data is the billable-usage view, distinct from meetings_meeting's configuration view.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: report_meeting-participants
tools.description: Retrieve ended meeting participants report. Required: meetingId. Optional: page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: report_meeting-polls
tools.description: Retrieve every participant's poll responses for an ended meeting, grouped by participant with their name, email, and per-question answers. Required: meetingId (path). Read-only. Requires a paid plan and report:read:admin scope. Use meetings_polls_meeting for the poll definitions; this returns the collected answers.

params.name: meetingId
params.description: The meeting ID or meeting UUID. If given meeting ID, will take the last meeting instance.

tools.name: report_meetings
tools.description: Retrieve ended meetings report for a specified period. Required: userId, from, to. Optional: page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: report_telephone
tools.description: Retrieve telephone report for a specified period <aside>Toll Report option would be removed.</aside>. Required: from, to. Optional: type, page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: report_users
tools.description: Retrieve active or inactive hosts report for a specified period. Required: from, to. Optional: type, page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: report_webinar-details
tools.description: Retrieve the post-webinar usage report for an ended webinar: host, topic, scheduled vs. actual times, duration, and total/unique attendee counts. Required: webinarId (path). Read-only. Requires a paid plan and report:read:admin scope. Billing-usage view, distinct from webinars_webinar's configuration view.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

tools.name: report_webinar-participants
tools.description: Retrieve ended webinar participants report. Required: webinarId. Optional: page_size, next_page_token.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: report_webinar-polls
tools.description: Retrieve every attendee's poll responses for an ended webinar, grouped by attendee with name, email, and per-question answers. Required: webinarId (path). Read-only. Requires a paid plan and report:read:admin scope.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

tools.name: report_webinar-qa
tools.description: Retrieve the Q&A transcript from an ended webinar: each asked question with the asker's name/email and the answers given. Required: webinarId (path). Read-only. Requires a paid plan, report:read:admin scope, and Q&A enabled on the webinar.

params.name: webinarId
params.description: The webinar ID or webinar UUID. If given webinar ID, will take the last webinar instance.

tools.name: tracking-fields_create
tools.description: Create a Tracking Field on your Zoom account.

tools.name: tracking-fields_delete
tools.description: Delete a Tracking Field on your Zoom account. Required: fieldId. Destructive.

tools.name: tracking-fields_get
tools.description: Retrieve a single account tracking field by id, returning its field name, recommended/required flags, and allowed values. Required: fieldId (path). Read-only. Tracking fields tag meetings/webinars for usage reporting; use tracking-fields_list to discover ids.

tools.name: tracking-fields_list
tools.description: List all tracking fields configured on your Zoom account, returning each field's id, name, recommended/required flags, and visible/allowed values. Read-only. Tracking fields categorize meetings and webinars for billing and usage reports. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: tracking-fields_update
tools.description: Update a Tracking Field on your Zoom account. Required: fieldId. Partial update.

tools.name: tsp_tsp
tools.description: Retrieve account-level Telephony Service Provider (TSP) configuration: enabled flag, master/dial-in numbers, and call-out country settings. Read-only. Use users_tsp_user for a specific user's TSP accounts. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: tsp_update
tools.description: Update TSP information on account level. Partial update.

tools.name: users_create
tools.description: Create a new user on your account. Required (body): action ('create', 'autoCreate', 'custCreate', or 'ssoCreate') and user_info with email, type (1=Basic, 2=Licensed, 3=On-prem), and optional first_name/last_name. Returns the new user's id and email. Choose 'create' to send an activation email; 'autoCreate' to provision without one. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: users_delete
tools.description: Delete a user on your account. Required: userId. Optional: action, transfer_email, transfer_meeting (plus 2 more). Destructive.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_email
tools.description: Check if the user email exists. Required: email.

tools.name: users_update
tools.description: Update a user on your account. Required: userId. Partial update.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_user
tools.description: Retrieve a user on your account. Required: userId. Optional: login_type.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_users
tools.description: List users on your account. Optional: status, page_size, page_number.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: users_vanity-name
tools.description: Check if the user's personal meeting room name exists. Required: vanity_name.

tools.name: users_zpk
tools.description: Check if the zpk is expired. The zpk is used to authenticate a user. Required: zpk.

tools.name: users_assistants_user
tools.description: List the scheduling assistants assigned to a user, returning each assistant's id and email. Required: userId (path; accepts an email or user id). Read-only. Assistants can schedule and manage meetings on the user's behalf.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_assistants_user-create
tools.description: Assign one or more scheduling assistants to a user. Required: userId (path); assistants[] (body) — each entry an existing user's id or email. Returns the added assistant ids. Assistants gain rights to schedule on the user's behalf; this adds to, rather than replaces, the existing list.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_assistants_user-delete
tools.description: Delete all of a user'sassitants. Required: userId. Destructive.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_assistants_user-delete-users
tools.description: Delete one of a user's assistants. Required: userId, assistantId. Destructive.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_email_user-update
tools.description: Change a user's login email address. Required: userId (path); email (body, the new address). Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. The new address must not already belong to another Zoom user. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_meetings_create
tools.description: Create a meeting for a user <aside>The expiration time of start_url is two hours. But for API users, the expiration time is 90 days.</aside>. Required: userId.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_meetings_meetings
tools.description: List meetings for a user. Required: userId. Optional: type, page_size, page_number.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: users_pac_user
tools.description: List a user's Personal Audio Conference (PAC) accounts, returning each conference_id, dedicated dial-in numbers, and participant/listen-only passwords. Required: userId (path). Read-only. PAC requires the feature to be enabled on the user's plan.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_password_user
tools.description: Set or reset a user's Zoom login password. Required: userId (path); password (body, the new value meeting account complexity rules). Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. State-changing; the user is signed out of active sessions. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_permissions_user
tools.description: Retrieve the granular feature permissions granted to a user, returned as an array of permission keys. Required: userId (path). Read-only. Use this to audit what an account user is allowed to do before changing their role or type.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_picture_user
tools.description: Upload and set a user's profile picture. Required: userId (path); pic_file (multipart body, JPG/JPEG/PNG up to 2MB). Returns HTTP 201 on success. State-changing; replaces the existing avatar.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_recordings_list
tools.description: List all the recordings. Required: userId, from, to. Optional: page_size, next_page_token, mc (plus 1 more).

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: next_page_token
params.description: Next page token is used to paginate through large result sets.

tools.name: users_schedulers_user
tools.description: List the users who have assigned this user as their scheduling assistant (the inverse of users_assistants_user), returning each scheduler's id and email. Required: userId (path). Read-only.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_schedulers_user-delete
tools.description: Delete all of a user'schedulers. Required: userId. Destructive.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_schedulers_user-delete-users
tools.description: Delete one of a user's schedulers. Required: userId, schedulerId. Destructive.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_settings_user
tools.description: Retrieve a user's settings. Required: userId. Optional: login_type.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_settings_user-update
tools.description: Update a user's settings. Required: userId. Partial update.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_status_user
tools.description: Activate or deactivate a user account. Required: userId (path); action (body) — 'activate' or 'deactivate'. Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. Deactivated users cannot sign in but retain their data; state-changing. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_token_user
tools.description: Retrieve a user's token. Required: userId. Optional: type.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_token_user-ssotoken-delete
tools.description: Revoke a user's SSO token. Required: userId. Destructive.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_tsp_user
tools.description: List a user's Telephony Service Provider (TSP) accounts, returning each tsp_account's id, provider, and dial-in/call-out numbers. Required: userId (path). Read-only. Use tsp_tsp for account-wide TSP config.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_tsp_user-tspcreate
tools.description: Add a Telephony Service Provider (TSP) account to a user. Required: userId (path); tsp_bridge plus the provider's conference/dial-in credentials (body). Returns the created tsp_account id. State-changing; a user can hold up to two TSP accounts.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_tsp_user-tspdelete
tools.description: Delete a user's TSP account. Required: userId, tspId. Destructive.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_tsp_user-tspupdate
tools.description: Update a user's TSP account. Required: userId, tspId. Partial update.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_tsp_user-users
tools.description: Retrieve a user's TSP account. Required: userId, tspId.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_webinars_create
tools.description: Create a webinar for a user <aside>The expiration time of start_url is two hours. But for API users, the expiration time is 90 days.</aside>. Required: userId.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

tools.name: users_webinars_webinars
tools.description: List webinars for a user. Required: userId. Optional: page_size, page_number.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID or email address

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: webhooks_create
tools.description: Create an account webhook subscription. Required (body): a public HTTPS endpoint url and an events array naming the event types to deliver. Returns the new webhook's id and status. Webhooks push event notifications (meeting.started, recording.completed, etc.) to your endpoint. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: webhooks_delete
tools.description: Delete an account webhook subscription, permanently stopping event delivery to its endpoint. Required: webhookId (path). Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. Destructive and irreversible — list with webhooks_webhooks to confirm the id first.

tools.name: webhooks_switch
tools.description: Switch the webhook API version for the account (legacy v1 vs. current). Body: the target version. Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. Account-wide partial update that affects how all webhook payloads are formatted; change deliberately. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: webhooks_update
tools.description: Partially update an existing webhook subscription — change its endpoint url, the subscribed events array, or its enabled status. Required: webhookId (path); only the fields you want to change (body). Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. Send a partial patch, not the full object.

tools.name: webhooks_webhook
tools.description: Retrieve a single webhook subscription by id, returning its endpoint url, subscribed events array, and status. Required: webhookId (path). Read-only. Use webhooks_webhooks to discover ids.

tools.name: webhooks_webhooks
tools.description: List all webhook subscriptions on the account, returning each webhook's id, endpoint url, events array, and status. Read-only. Use this to audit which endpoints receive which events before creating or deleting subscriptions. Requires account-level (admin) auth.

tools.name: webinars_delete
tools.description: Delete a webinar. Required: webinarId. Optional: occurrence_id. Destructive.

tools.name: webinars_update
tools.description: Partially update a scheduled webinar's configuration — topic, start_time, duration, agenda, or settings. Required: webinarId (path); only the fields to change (body). Optional: occurrence_id to target one instance of a recurring webinar. Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. Send a partial patch, not the full object.

tools.name: webinars_webinar
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a single webinar: topic, type, status, start_time, duration, timezone, join_url, registration_url, and settings. Required: webinarId (path). Optional: occurrence_id for a specific instance. Read-only. Use when you already have a webinar id and need its current configuration.

tools.name: webinars_panelists_webinar
tools.description: List the panelists invited to a webinar, returning each panelist's id, name, email, and join_url. Required: webinarId (path). Read-only. Panelists differ from attendees — they can speak and share. Use this to discover panelist ids before removing one.

tools.name: webinars_panelists_webinar-create
tools.description: Add one or more panelists to a webinar. Required: webinarId (path); panelists[] (body) — each entry a name and email. Returns the added panelist ids. Each panelist receives a unique join URL granting speak/share rights. Adds to the existing panelist list.

tools.name: webinars_panelists_webinar-delete
tools.description: Remove all panelists from a webinar. Required: webinarId. Destructive.

tools.name: webinars_panelists_webinar-delete-webinars
tools.description: Remove a panelist from a webinar. Required: webinarId, panelistId. Destructive.

tools.name: webinars_polls_webinar
tools.description: List all polls configured on a webinar, returning each poll's id, title, status, and questions. Required: webinarId (path). Read-only. Use this to discover poll ids before webinars_polls_webinar-get or webinars_polls_webinar-update.

tools.name: webinars_polls_webinar-create
tools.description: Create a poll for a webinar. Required: webinarId.

tools.name: webinars_polls_webinar-delete
tools.description: Delete a webinar's Poll. Required: webinarId, pollId. Destructive.

tools.name: webinars_polls_webinar-get
tools.description: Retrieve a single poll on a webinar, including its title, status, and full question/answer-option list. Required: webinarId and pollId (both path). Read-only. Use webinars_polls_webinar first if you don't have the pollId.

tools.name: webinars_polls_webinar-update
tools.description: Replace a webinar's poll definition (title and the full questions array) in place. Required: webinarId and pollId (path); title and questions (body). Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. Overwrites the poll, so send the complete questions list.

tools.name: webinars_registrants_webinar
tools.description: List registrants for a webinar. Required: webinarId. Optional: occurrence_id, status, page_size (plus 1 more).

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of records returned within a single API call

params.name: page_number
params.description: Current page number of returned records

tools.name: webinars_registrants_webinar-create
tools.description: Add a registrant for a webinar. Required: webinarId. Optional: occurrence_ids.

params.name: occurrence_ids
params.description: Occurrence IDs, could get this value from Webinar Get API. Multiple value separated by comma.

tools.name: webinars_registrants_webinar-status
tools.description: Update a webinar registrant's status. Required: webinarId. Optional: occurrence_id.

tools.name: webinars_status_webinar
tools.description: Change a webinar's status. Required: webinarId (path); action (body) — typically 'end' to end a live webinar. Returns HTTP 204 (no body) on success. State-changing; use webinars_webinar to inspect the webinar first.
